notFound.title: Storefront Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for isn't available. Make sure the link you opened is correct.

inactive.desc: {{namaBisnis}} is temporarily not accepting bookings. Please check back later.

loadError.title: Failed to Load Page
loadError.desc: Something went wrong while loading this storefront. Try reloading the page.

transport.title: Travel Fee
transport.flatDesc: A flat travel fee of {{nominal}} applies to all locations.

availability.title: Check Availability
availability.desc: Pick a date to see the open time slots.
availability.hint: Pick a date to see available slots.
availability.empty: No available slots on this date.
availability.loadError: Failed to load availability. Try another date.

servicesStep.title: Choose the services you'd like to book
servicesStep.empty: No services available to book yet.
servicesStep.transportZoneEmpty: Travel zones haven't been set up by the MUA yet. Please contact the MUA directly for travel fee info.
servicesStep.validationZone: Please choose a travel zone first.

scheduleStep.title: Pick the event date & time
scheduleStep.durasiInfo: Total duration of selected services: {{durasi}} minutes
scheduleStep.hint: Pick a date to see the available slots.
scheduleStep.empty: No available slots on this date. Try another date.
scheduleStep.loadError: Failed to load availability. Try another date.

detailsStep.title: Complete your details
detailsStep.lokasiAcaraPlaceholder: Full address of the event location
detailsStep.customFieldFileNote: File upload coming soon — please contact the MUA directly if needed.

summaryStep.title: Booking Summary
summaryStep.dpNote: The final amount will be recalculated by the system on submit.

errors.notFound: Storefront not found or currently not accepting bookings.
errors.conflict: The selected slot was just taken. Please choose another slot.
errors.throttle: Too many attempts, please try again later.
errors.generic: Failed to create booking. Please try again.

success.title: Booking Created Successfully!
success.paymentMissing: The MUA hasn't set up payment info yet. Please contact the MUA directly for payment instructions.

report.title: Report This Page
report.desc: Let us know if this page violates our terms (inappropriate content, scam, etc).
report.alasanPlaceholder: Explain your reason for reporting (minimum 10 characters)
report.toastThrottle: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.
report.toastError: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
